embeds.description: Evernight was the dismal echo of Neverwinter located in the Shadowfell. It was a city of the undead and those that trafficked with them—unhinged necromancers, slave traders, and followers of dark...

Hello is there any list of the "official" way the game thinks you will play stories and things? Starting from Chapter 7 it feels like the game expects me to have played more than just the main story but I'm unsure what things it expected me to play.
oh chap 8 is just rushed bcuz game is facing EOS threat back then
they have to skipped over GDoll introduction as well as Castor and Pollux to go straight to Hameln lol
Definitely a different N thankfully 😭
Iirc one of his "full names" was already posted somewhere here, N is just the first letter
"one"
are you having fun in spain?

before starting chapter 7 you can play up to horla's special ops story to get some more background information, but in terms of what you'll definitely have to read, it'll be the alternate ramonas deepdive and sorels special ops as they'll introduce concepts and characters that'll be pretty relevant in chapter 7
most of the other stories are awakener backstories or self contained ones that dont have too much of an impact on the greater scale of things
Ah yeah I already did 7 I'm in 8 but like they mention Ramona Timeworn as if I knew her and in 8 they seem like I know a lot more world building than I do. Ok I'll work towards Sorel next
it should be noted that chronolgically speaking every special ops up to horlas takes place before chapter 7, so theres that too
oh, in that case every special ops takes place before chapter 8
so does castors dreamscape as well, which does have a bit of relevance to chapter 8
Is there any that are very important in terms of lore? With it taking a week to unlock each one I probably won't wait but maybe some are more important than others.
probably just sorel, alternate ramonas, then rykers as well.
